playbooks.title: First Value Acceleration Playbook
playbooks.when_to_run: Immediately after kickoff when no repository or pipeline is active.
trigger_signals: Kickoff completed with no active repository migration
No successful pipeline in first 14 days
playbooks.objective: Deliver first visible value within 30 days using one production workflow.
preparation_steps: Review onboarding checklist milestones and owners
Validate access model and runner readiness
Confirm first implementation workflow with engineering lead
execution_agenda: Confirm first value goal and definition of done
Select pilot repository and configure CI pipeline
Validate successful pipeline run and owner handoff
Capture evidence and set next adoption milestone

artifacts_generated.name: First Value Summary
artifacts_generated.description: Customer-facing summary of first value completion.
artifacts_generated.template:
Customer:
Goal:
Workflow Implemented:
Pipeline Created:
Evidence Date:
Next Adoption Goal:

playbooks.next_best_action: Launch onboarding sprint to complete one production-ready pipeline.

templates.agenda: Align first-value scope, configure workflow, and confirm evidence.
templates.followup: Recap first-value milestone, owners, and next onboarding checkpoint.
templates.issue: Track first-value milestone tasks, blockers, and completion evidence.

watch_items: Escalate if first value slips beyond day 30.

playbooks.title: Platform Adoption Expansion Playbook
playbooks.when_to_run: When customer has one to two active use cases and needs broader coverage.
trigger_signals: Platform adoption below 3 green use cases
Use case scorecards show uneven maturity
Pipeline activity concentrated in one team
playbooks.objective: Expand to 3+ green use cases and improve platform value score.
preparation_steps: Review platform value score and use-case baseline
Select target use case and success metric
Map technical prerequisites and owners
execution_agenda: Review current workflow and lifecycle gaps
Prioritize next use case with implementation path
Schedule workshop motion with customer team
Define two-week success checkpoint

artifacts_generated.name: Adoption Expansion Plan
artifacts_generated.description: Plan to move from 1-2 use cases to 3+ green.
artifacts_generated.template:
Current Use Cases:
Target Use Case:
Technical Prerequisites:
Workshop Date:
Success Metrics:

playbooks.next_best_action: Prioritize lowest-scoring use case and schedule enablement workshop.

checklist.label: Target use case selected with success metric
Workshop date and technical attendees confirmed

templates.agenda: Review scorecard, pick next use case, and set execution path.
templates.followup: Summarize adoption plan, owners, and due dates.
templates.issue: Track expansion work items and evidence checkpoints.

playbooks.title: Adoption Stall Recovery Playbook
playbooks.when_to_run: When adoption has stalled for 30+ days or health trends negative.
trigger_signals: Platform value score declining month over month
No new pipeline or commit growth
playbooks.objective: Restore momentum by clearing blockers and setting near-term milestones.
preparation_steps: Review health drivers and open requests
Collect use-case trend evidence
Prepare blocker-focused technical deep dive
execution_agenda: Identify root causes with customer stakeholders
Prioritize remediation actions and owners
Route to office hours or lab motion
Commit to two-week measurable checkpoint

artifacts_generated.name: Risk Mitigation Action Plan
artifacts_generated.description: Action plan for blocker resolution and accountability.
artifacts_generated.template:
Adoption Blocker:
Root Cause:
Remediation Action:
Owner:
Target Completion:

playbooks.next_best_action: Run blocker-resolution session and assign remediation owners.

checklist.label: Recovery actions assigned with due dates

templates.agenda: Review stall drivers, remediation plan, and milestone timing.
templates.followup: Share mitigation actions, owners, and checkpoint date.
templates.issue: Track risk mitigation tasks and closure evidence.

watch_items: Escalate to leadership if two checkpoints are missed.

playbooks.title: Executive Business Review (EBR) Playbook
playbooks.when_to_run: Quarterly and during strategic renewal planning.
playbooks.objective: Align executives on outcomes delivered, risks, and roadmap priorities.
preparation_steps: Assemble adoption and health trend metrics
Build value narrative with customer outcomes
Draft strategic recommendations and decisions needed
execution_agenda: Review outcomes delivered since prior checkpoint
Present platform adoption and maturity movement
Discuss risk posture and mitigation actions
Agree roadmap priorities and owner commitments

artifacts_generated.name: Executive Business Review Summary
artifacts_generated.description: Executive-ready summary of value and next-step strategy.
artifacts_generated.template:
Adoption Progress:
Business Outcomes:
Platform Expansion Opportunities:
Strategic Recommendations:

playbooks.next_best_action: Run EBR with value narrative and executive decision log.

templates.agenda: Review outcomes, risks, and roadmap alignment with executives.
templates.followup: Share executive decisions, owners, and next quarter commitments.
templates.issue: Track executive follow-through actions and due dates.

playbooks.title: DevSecOps Capability Expansion Playbook
playbooks.when_to_run: When CI/CD maturity is stable and secure controls are not yet embedded.
trigger_signals: CI pipelines active in core teams
playbooks.objective: Introduce secure controls in pipelines while protecting delivery velocity.
preparation_steps: Assess current pipeline and policy baseline
Identify pilot repositories for Secure rollout
Confirm findings workflow ownership
execution_agenda: Review security gaps in current delivery workflow
Enable baseline scanning controls in pilot repos
Validate triage workflow for findings
Plan phased expansion to additional teams

artifacts_generated.name: Security Expansion Plan
artifacts_generated.description: Enablement plan for Secure adoption in CI/CD.
artifacts_generated.template:
Security Feature Introduced:
Pipeline Changes:
Findings Workflow:
Risk Reduction Outcome:

playbooks.next_best_action: Launch Secure pilot in one service and measure coverage growth.

checklist.label: Coverage target set for next quarter

templates.agenda: Define Secure rollout, owners, and pilot success criteria.
templates.followup: Publish secure rollout status and next milestone dates.
templates.issue: Track Secure adoption tasks and findings workflow actions.

playbooks.title: Renewal Readiness Playbook
playbooks.when_to_run: 120 days before renewal or earlier for yellow/red accounts.
playbooks.objective: Validate adoption, engagement, and value proof to improve renewal confidence.
preparation_steps: Review renewal risk signals and adoption coverage
Compile value proof and outcome evidence
Confirm executive alignment plan
execution_agenda: Assess readiness across adoption, engagement, and value
Review active risks and mitigation owners
Set executive communication cadence
Finalize readiness milestones through renewal date

artifacts_generated.name: Renewal Readiness Assessment
artifacts_generated.description: Structured readiness checkpoint for renewal execution.
artifacts_generated.template:
Health Status:
Adoption Coverage:
Executive Sponsor Alignment:
Renewal Confidence:
Top Risks:

playbooks.next_best_action: Run renewal readiness checkpoint and close top risk gaps before next exec review.

templates.agenda: Review renewal readiness, risk plan, and executive alignment steps.
templates.followup: Share readiness status, blockers, and closure plan.
templates.issue: Track renewal-critical tasks, owners, and deadlines.

watch_items: Escalate if executive sponsor remains unconfirmed inside 45-day window.

playbooks.title: CI/CD Workshop Playbook
playbooks.when_to_run: When engineering teams need hands-on workflow enablement.
playbooks.objective: Enable repeatable CI/CD execution with documented handoff and ownership.
preparation_steps: Confirm participant roles and repositories
Validate runner and permissions prerequisites
Prepare workshop runbook and examples
execution_agenda: Walk through GitLab workflow and architecture
Create pipeline and merge request automation flow
Review troubleshooting and optimization patterns
Capture post-workshop rollout actions

artifacts_generated.name: Workshop Runbook
artifacts_generated.description: Workshop facilitation plan with prerequisite checklist.
artifacts_generated.template:

playbooks.next_best_action: Schedule CI/CD workshop and log implementation follow-up owners.

templates.agenda: Run CI/CD workshop from repo setup through deployment flow.
templates.followup: Share workshop outcomes, owners, and adoption checkpoint.
templates.issue: Track workshop action items and completion evidence.
